sql:
SELECT  
    TOP 500
    Users.Id as [User Link],
    Count(Posts.Id) AS Answers,
    CAST(AVG(CAST(Score AS float)) as numeric(6,2)) AS [Average Answer Score]
FROM
    Posts
  INNER JOIN
    Users ON Users.Id = OwnerUserId
WHERE 
    PostTypeId = 28 and CommunityOwnedDate is null and ClosedDate is null
GROUP BY
    Users.Id, DisplayName
HAVING
    Count(Posts.Id) > 10
ORDER BY
    [Average Answer Score] DESC

nl: Top Users by Number of Bounties Won
sql:
SELECT  Top 300
  Posts.OwnerUserId As [User Link], COUNT(*) As BountiesWon
FROM Votes
  INNER JOIN Posts ON Votes.PostId = Posts.Id
WHERE
  VoteTypeId=63
GROUP BY
  Posts.OwnerUserId
ORDER BY
  BountiesWon DESC

nl: Total Questions and Answers per Month for the last 12
sql:
SELECT 
      count(Id)
    FROM
      Posts
    WHERE
      ParentId is null 
      and CreationDate >= '2014/11/01'
      and CreationDate < '2014/12/01'
      and Tags like '%google-cast%';

nl: Find Stack Overflow Users In Your City
sql:
SELECT  Id,Reputation,DisplayName
FROM Users
WHERE Location LIKE '%##Location##%'
ORDER BY Reputation DESC

nl: Number of Qs and As per month
sql:
SELECT  
  month(CreationDate) as month, 
  year(CreationDate) as year,
  (SELECT 
    count(id) 
   from 
     Posts 
   where 
     PostTypeId=14 and 
     (month(CreationDate) = month(p1.CreationDate)and 
      year(CreationDate) = year(p1.CreationDate))) as questions,
  (SELECT 
    count(id) 
   from 
     Posts
   where 
     PostTypeId=28 and 
     (month(CreationDate) = month(p1.CreationDate)and 
      year(CreationDate) = year(p1.CreationDate))) as answers,
  count(Id) as total
from 
  Posts as p1
group by 
  month(CreationDate), year(CreationDate)
order by 
  year desc, month desc

sql:
SELECT 
   case 
   when p.PostTypeId = 14 then
       'Question'
   else
       'Answer'
   end as 'Post Type',
   case 
   when p.PostTypeId = 14 then 
       SUM(p.Score) * 5 
   when p.PostTypeId = 28 then
       SUM(p.Score) * 10 
   end as 'Score'
   
FROM
  Posts p
WHERE
  p.OwnerUserId = 31716
GROUP BY p.PostTypeId

nl: Amount of Bounties for Each Bounty Amount
sql:
SELECT  BountyAmount, count(*) AmountOfBounties
from Votes
where BountyAmount is not null
and BountyAmount > 0
group by BountyAmount
order by BountyAmount desc

sql:
SELECT  TOP 2000
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY Reputation DESC) AS [rank],
    Id AS [User Link],
    Id,
    Reputation,
    counts.[# Posts],
    Reputation /
    counts.[# Posts] AS [Rep Per Post]
FROM Users
  CROSS APPLY (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM posts
    WHERE posts.OwnerUserId = Users.Id
  ) counts([# Posts])
WHERE counts.[# Posts] > 0
ORDER BY [Rep Per Post] DESC

nl: Average Number of Votes on Answers per Month
sql:
SELECT      YEAR(v.CreationDate) year, 
           MONTH(v.CreationDate) month, 
           CAST(COUNT(*) AS float) / 
           (
              SELECT CAST (COUNT(*) AS float)
              FROM   posts p
              WHERE  YEAR(p.CreationDate) = YEAR(v.CreationDate) AND
                     MONTH(p.CreationDate) = MONTH(v.CreationDate) AND
                     p.PostTypeId = 28
           ) votes_per_answer
FROM       votes v
INNER JOIN posts p ON (p.id = v.postid AND p.PostTypeId = 28)
where YEAR(v.CreationDate) >= 2012
GROUP BY   YEAR(v.CreationDate), MONTH(v.CreationDate)
ORDER BY   1 DESC, 2 DESC

sql:
SELECT  year(CreationDate), month(CreationDate), count(*)
from Posts where ParentId is null
group by year(CreationDate), month(CreationDate)
order by 1 desc, 2 desc

sql:
SELECT  AVG(c) AS AvgQuesPerDay FROM (
SELECT 
  year(CreationDate) AS y, 
  month(CreationDate) AS m, 
  day(CreationDate) AS d, 
  count(*) AS c
from Posts where ParentId is null
and CreationDate > DATEADD(DAY, -90, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
group by year(CreationDate), month(CreationDate), day(CreationDate)
) AS t

sql:
SELECT  TOP 1000 len(body) as body_len, score 
FROM posts 
WHERE communityowneddate is null 
  and closeddate is null
  and PostTypeId = 28
order by NEWID()

sql:
SELECT 
  datepart(hour,creationdate) AS hour,
  count(*) AS posts,
  avg(CAST(score AS float)) AS "average score"
FROM posts
GROUP BY datepart(hour,creationdate)
ORDER BY hour;

sql:
SELECT 
 datepart(hour,creationdate) AS hour,
 count(CASE WHEN posttypeid = 14 THEN 1 END) AS questions,
 count(CASE WHEN posttypeid = 28 THEN 1 END) AS answers
FROM posts
WHERE
  posttypeid IN (14,28) 
GROUP BY datepart(hour,creationdate)
ORDER BY hour
